name: Albassam — Private Family Office
description: A private family office ledger — warm paper ground, bronze seal, editorial serif numerals for the figures that matter. v2 light system (2026-07-06); supersedes the original obsidian/gold theme.

logo.notes: One mark in two weights: logos/header.svg is the khatam seal lockup (two rotated 18×18 squares + a 2r center dot, bronze #A07D4B stroke) as shipped in the topbar <svg>. logos/favicon.svg is the simplified two-square favicon (no center dot) matching the inline data-URI <link rel="icon">. No raster logo, no apple-touch-icon, no og:image — the page ships meta name="robots" content="noindex" and isn't meant to be socially shared.

colors.name: Paper
colors.usage: page canvas — warm off-white ground (measured from --paper, used on <body>)

colors.name: Card
colors.usage: cards, the segmented stat strip, registry panels, ledger, inputs (measured from --card)

colors.name: Ink
colors.usage: body text, figures, and filled primary buttons (measured from --ink)

colors.name: Ink 60
colors.usage: secondary text — labels, captions, subtitles (measured from --ink-2; a faint tier --ink-3 #A29C93 / oklch(69.5% 0.015 78.2) covers hints and chart axes)

colors.name: Hair
colors.usage: hairlines, dividers, card edges (measured from --hair; inputs use --hair-2 #DBD5C9 one step stronger)

colors.name: Bronze
colors.usage: the brand's signal color — seal, ownership percentages, chart line, focus rings (measured from --accent; --accent-soft #B08D55 / oklch(66.4% 0.085 78.2) for strokes and graphics, --accent-tint #F3EDE1 as fill)

colors.name: Terracotta / Loss
colors.usage: negative figures, destructive actions, danger states only (measured from --loss; tint #FBEDEB; reserved exclusively for loss/decrease semantics, never decorative). Gains use emerald #1E7A4F / oklch(51.6% 0.109 158.0) with tint #E9F4EE, equally rationed.

voice.tone: Quiet-luxury and custodial rather than corporate-SaaS: the copy reads like the ledger of a family office, not a fintech product. Short, formal nouns (Registry, Ledger, Members, Portfolio history) stand in for feature names. Sentence case everywhere; no exclamation points, no growth verbs, no casual contractions in headings. English only — the Arabic subtitle from v1 was removed by the owner's decision on 2026-07-06 and must not be reintroduced.

imagery.style: No photography — the identity is the line-art khatam seal (two rotated squares + center dot) in bronze strokes on warm paper, plus the numbers themselves set in Fraunces.
imagery.treatment: Thin bronze linework, generous negative space, one slow 300s ambient rotation on the seal's tick ring (disabled under prefers-reduced-motion). Soft warm-tinted shadows allowed; the only gradient is the chart's faint bronze area fill.

layout.spacing: 4px base unit; 16–24px component padding; 56–72px section rhythm
postureRules: Left-aligned product topbar (seal + 'Albassam · Family office' wordmark in Fraunces, status pills right) — not a centered ceremonial masthead; that was v1.
Asymmetric hero: the holdings figure sits left in HTML type with P/L and zakat as tinted chips, the seal sits right; the layout stacks centered on mobile. The value never renders inside the seal SVG.
Stats are one segmented white card with hairline-divided cells, not floating boxes.
Sentence case headings in Fraunces with a one-line muted subtitle; the only tracked-caps element is the hero eyebrow ('Total holdings').
Two numeral registers: tabular Geist for UI copy and dates, Fraunces reserved for the figures that matter (hero value, stat values, ownership percentages).
Semantic color is rationed: bronze marks brand, emerald #1E7A4F solely gains, terracotta #B4453A solely losses/danger — none of the three is ever decorative.
Motion is three restrained gestures: the seal's slow rotation, a fade-up entrance stagger, and hover lift on cards — nothing else, all disabled under prefers-reduced-motion.
Buttons: ink-filled primary with hover shift and active scale(0.98); quiet (white/hairline) and danger (terracotta ghost) variants; visible bronze focus rings on all interactive elements.
